scene.mamba.title: Mamba — selective copying
mamba.ch.intro.title: The task
mamba.ch.intro.body: Selective copying: 4 data tokens hide among NOISE, then a GO marker; the model must emit the 4 data tokens in order. Every cell here is a real value from a 2-layer, d_model-48 Mamba that solves the task at over 99% accuracy. The same input runs through every architecture in this atlas.
mamba.ch.embed.title: Embedding
mamba.ch.embed.body: Each token id selects a row of the embedding table E (16 × 48). The result is the residual stream: one 48-vector per position, 21 positions tall. This is the only place the discrete token enters — everything below is continuous.
mamba.ch.block.title: The block
mamba.ch.block.body: A Mamba block reads the residual stream and adds a correction back to it: RMSNorm, then in_proj splits into a value path and a gate z, a causal conv mixes neighbours, the selective scan runs, z gates the result, and out_proj writes it back. Follow the spine top to bottom; the matrices beside each stage are what it multiplies by.
mamba.ch.conv.title: Local mixing
mamba.ch.conv.body: Before the scan, a depthwise causal 1-D convolution (kernel 4) lets each channel mix the last few positions. Causal means it never reads ahead. This is cheap short-range context; long-range memory is the scan's job.
mamba.ch.selection.title: Selection
mamba.ch.selection.body: This is what makes Mamba selective. The step size Δ and the scan inputs B, C are computed from the current token (x_proj, dt_proj), not fixed. A linear time-invariant SSM reuses one A, B, C at every step; here they change per token, so the model can choose to absorb a token or ignore it.
mamba.ch.scan.title: The scan
mamba.ch.scan.body: The recurrence, token by token. A fixed-size state h (d_inner × d_state) carries the past forward: h ← exp(Δ⊙A)·h + Δ⊙B·x. When Δ ≈ 0 the old state passes through untouched (the token is ignored); when Δ is large the new token is written in. Watch Δ stay small on NOISE and open up on data tokens — that is selection doing the copying.
mamba.ch.gate.title: Gate & output
mamba.ch.gate.body: The scan output y is gated elementwise by SiLU(z): the z path from in_proj decides which channels survive. out_proj maps the result back to d_model and adds it onto the residual stream.
mamba.ch.layer2.title: Second block
mamba.ch.layer2.body: The second block runs the same machine on the updated residual stream, refining the representation before readout.
mamba.ch.readout.title: Readout
mamba.ch.readout.body: A final RMSNorm, then lm_head projects each position to 16 logits. At the answer positions the argmax picks out the recalled data tokens — read them off head.logits and compare with the input.
mamba.ch.recap.title: Recap
mamba.ch.recap.body: One fixed-size state, updated through an input-dependent gate, copies selectively across the sequence — with no attention matrix. Open the GPT page to see the same input solved by attention instead.
scene.gpt.title: GPT — selective copying
gpt.ch.intro.title: The task
gpt.ch.intro.body: The same selective-copying input, now solved by a 2-layer GPT (d_model 48, 3 heads). Watch how a Transformer reaches back across the sequence with attention instead of carrying a running state.
gpt.ch.embed.title: Tokens + positions
gpt.ch.embed.body: GPT adds two embeddings: one for the token id, one for its position. Attention is order-agnostic on its own, so positions must be supplied explicitly — unlike Mamba, whose recurrence is inherently ordered.
gpt.ch.attention.title: Attention
gpt.ch.attention.body: Each head projects the stream to queries, keys and values, scores every pair Q·Kᵀ/√d, masks out future positions (−∞), and softmaxes each row into weights that sum to 1. The answer positions attend back to the data tokens — read the bright cells in the weight matrix. This T×T map is recomputed in full; nothing is carried forward.
gpt.ch.mlp.title: MLP
gpt.ch.mlp.body: After attention mixes across positions, a per-position MLP (48 → 192 → 48, GELU) transforms each token on its own. The wide hidden layer is where most of the parameters and the per-token computation live.
gpt.ch.readout.title: Readout
gpt.ch.readout.body: A final LayerNorm, then lm_head projects each position to 16 logits. At the answer positions the argmax recovers the copied tokens — the same result as Mamba, reached by attention rather than a scan.

ui.landing.title: Beyond Transformers
ui.landing.subtitle: A 3D, tensor-level tour of LLM architectures — real toy weights, computed live in your browser. The same selective-copying task, many different machines.
card.mamba.title: Mamba
card.mamba.desc: Selective state space — a fixed-size recurrent state with an input-dependent gate.

card.rwkv.title: RWKV
card.moe.title: Mixture of Experts
card.moe.desc: Sparse routing to a few expert MLPs per token.
card.kan.title: KAN
card.kan.desc: Kolmogorov–Arnold networks — learnable activations on edges.
card.retnet.title: RetNet / Hyena
card.retnet.desc: Retention and long convolutions as attention alternatives.
